title: beGLOSS Leather Polish 250 Leather Cleaner Gives Leathers a Glossy Leather Look
features: Fast and effective deep cleaning for leather clothing and leather products providing protection against aging and cracking - keeping leather smooth
Comes with a free cloth to wipe off excess polish

Made of high quality. Please be aware of the rubber/latex elements are provided matte to preserve the material. Clothing can be polished with a spray of silicone or liquid varnish, available in our accessories section
Sold by Honour, Tourner dreams in reality over 20 years.
description: Product Description beGLOSS Leather Polish leather cleaner gives leathers a glossy leather look beGLOSS Leather Polish leather cleaner gives leathers a glossy leather look - Instructions for use are available on every beGLOSS product. beGLOSS CLEAN & CARE LEATHER - leather cleaner and polish Leather is often exposed to many environmental factors and must always be resistant to these influences yet remain breathable, soft and supple. Luxury, style and glamour are often associated with leather It is all the more important to properly care for this noble material Whether clothing, handbags, shoes or accessories, with beGLOSS you take leather care to a whole new level CLEANER & POLISH united in one product! Contents: 100% Paraffinum Liquidum beGLOSS - Made in Germany beGLOSS Leather Polish leather cleaner gives leathers a glossy leather look Instructions for use are available on every beGLOSS bottle. Characteristics CLEANING Cleaner for sensitive products made of smooth leather such as handbags, clothing, shoes and accessories Reliably removes odours and residues CARE High-quality, gentle care for sophisticated leather SEALS Thanks to our special formula, the leather is sealed during cleaning PROTECTION Keeps the leather supple and soft. Protects against aging, fading and cracking BRILLIANCE Prevents colour loss and gives the leather the optimum shine HIGH-QUALITY Only the best! Without unnecessary additives UNIVERSAL Saves time and money. The beGLOSS leather cleaner combines cleaning and care polishing in one product ECONOMICAL Disc-Top closure for precision measuring of the leather cleaner QUALITY The only original with a sealed bottle! Thanks to the tamper-evident closure, our bottles are hygienically sealed and protected. Our product gives leather material a shiny, brilliant look. The perfect finishing touch for leather! beGLOSS leather care cleans your leather while keeping it soft and supple. beGLOSS - Made in Germany
